rules.reason: Changes touching three or more meaningful surfaces need manifest-backed closeout traceability.
Invoice-critical behavior needs explicit scope, validation, and residual-risk evidence.
Agent-facing contracts and operating-model surfaces require manifest tracking.
Workflow or scenario surfaces require scenario evidence and docs synchronization.
Frontend contract or API surfaces require frontend validation evidence.
Schema and generated-artifact changes require explicit generated-artifact evidence.
Agent, tooling, startup-routing, or closeout workflow changes need explicit evidence.
Multiple product domains in one changeset require explicit scope and residual-risk review.
